title: Verify AgenticStoreBackend scan() streams instead of loading full content
description: After m19 task (Fix AgenticStoreBackend scan() to stream), verify that the implementation truly streams via cursor/iteration rather than loading all content into memory. Compare memory usage with large files (>1MB) vs the previous implementation. Document results. Target: PRD §1 gap 'scan() streaming — AgenticStoreBackend loads full file content into memory'.
